title: Gladius
description: Adding new weapons and mechanics to Minecraft
body:
![Title Image "Gladius"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de37c9fbcbb465524bbe03823654f0a1484c0308.png)

A mod aiming to add more variety and strategy to combat with new weapons, enchantments, effects, and mechanics.

![Four Amor Stands in a row, each holding a different weapon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aaf9181f3ac8278805e0878c364a859a42071e3_0.webp)

If you find any bugs or have any suggestions, please report them on [GitHub](https://github.com/LittleEzra/Gladiator/issues)!

# Features
## Oil
Bottles of oil can be bought from Level 2 Weaponsmith Villagers. Entities covered in oil will take 4x as much damage from fire and burn blue.
## Flash Powder
Crafted with 2 Amethyst Shards, a Glow Ink Sac and Gunpowder. Flash Powder can be used to create a cloud that will confuse enemies caught within. The visual effects can be changed in the config.

![Flash Powder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75127053d32803afdb7e00a48d03659630b320a9.png)

## Crystal Butterfly
When renamed to a Player's name, it will try to fly to that player.

![Crystal Butterfly Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bff01db25396fb348eff090297bd1f9d67ba8da.png)

## Golden Wand
A ranged weapon that can shoot weak projectiles. Has up to 10 charges, which can be recharged by hitting enemies with a melee attack. A simple punch won't be enough, though!

![Golden Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46daf6bb2b6658d965c0ebcba61d8954ed0a5464.png)

This isn't all of the features in the mod, an I'm planning to add more with time, too.
